description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a dark metallic finish and a minimalist design. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a thin bezel and a small camera notch at the top center. The keyboard is compact, with black keys and white lettering, and includes a large trackpad below the keyboard. The back of the device displays a prominent, glossy Apple logo centered on the lid. The sides of the laptop are thin, with visible ports along the left and right edges. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a sleek and professional appearance typical of high-end consumer electronics.
description: A sleek, dark metallic laptop with a large screen, compact keyboard, and a prominent Apple logo on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display, thin bezels, and full keyboard with trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile and visible keyboard depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid lid with a centered, glossy Apple logo.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile and keyboard layout from another angle.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy black Apple logo is centered on the back of the laptop lid, shaped as a stylized apple with a bite taken out of the right side.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be on, displaying a bright, blank or white screen with no visible content.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad, featuring black keys with white lettering.
